description: Run deterministic source-code security checks, triage findings with Codex, delegate blocking fixes, and rescan until high and medium findings are resolved.

prompts.rielflowPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start with deterministic security scanning. Triage the scanner evidence and source code. If high or medium findings remain, package a narrow fix request for codex-design-and-implement-review-loop. After the delegated fix returns, rescan deterministically and run acceptance review. Repeat until no high or medium findings remain, then publish output. Low findings may be accepted only when explicitly documented as residual risk.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep commands, scanner availability, findings, severity, affected files, fix scope, verification, routing decisions, and residual risks explicit.

steps.description: Start the source security check loop and normalize scan inputs.
Run deterministic scanners and repository heuristics and write machine-readable evidence.
Review deterministic evidence and source code against secure-code-review controls.
Route to fix handoff when high or medium findings remain; otherwise finish.
Package blocking security findings into a delegated issue-resolution request.
Consume the delegated workflow result and prepare the next deterministic scan pass.

rielflowPackage.title: codex-source-security-check-loop
rielflowPackage.description: Run deterministic source-code security checks, triage findings with Codex, delegate blocking fixes, and rescan until high and medium findings are resolved.
